case_title: SUSANA CHOY VS. ERIKA LICHTIGER et al

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED MAY-14-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LICHTIGER, ADAM
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOY, SUSANA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-27-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-27-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT LICHTIGER, ERIKA LICHTIGER, ADAM

ORDER "DENIED" ON REQUEST TO ADVANCE SMALL HEARING FILED BY THE DEFENDANT. THE CASE WILL REMAIN SET ON AUG-27-2008 AT 3:30 PM. *(IF DEFENDANT IS UNABLE TO ATTEND THE HEARING IN PERSON, SHE MAY SUBMIT DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE TO THE COURT, AND REQUEST AN APPEARANCE BY TELEPHONE.
DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE, GRANTED. INSTRUCTIONS FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE SENT TO DEFENDANT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-27-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERIKA LICHTIGER APPEARS BY TELEPHONE. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBTS PRESENTED TO THE COURT BY GLORIAMARIE ARENEDA, A REPRESENTATIVE FROM DEFENDANT'S INSURANCE COMPANY. DEFENDANT PROVIDES THE CLERK WITH NEW ADDRESS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOY, SUSANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LICHTIGER, ERIKA LICHTIGER, ADAM $3,450.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,540.00, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES FOR PROPERTY LOSS TO BE $4600.00, AND ATTRIBUTES 25% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THIS JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF CHOY, SUSANA ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LICHTIGER, ERIKA LICHTIGER, ADAM
